patient.query: Yeah, I guess there have been times when I felt like I just messed everything up, like when I forgot my partner's birthday last year. I felt so awful, like I just couldn't get it right. There are moments, too, when I manage to stay calm, like when my friend was going through a tough time and I was there for her without losing it. But it’s hard to think about those good times when I'm in the middle of feeling like a failure. I don’t know
